titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Giorgio Agamben Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday March 6, 2020 at 04:25

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

langmaterial.language: Materials in Italian, French, and English.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Giorgio Agamben on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2017.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into nine series: I. Manuscripts of published books, 1970-2015. II. Manuscripts of published articles and essays, 1978-2004. III. Manuscripts of lectures, 1977-2015. IV. Annotated manuscripts of courses and seminars, 1978-2014. V. Manuscripts and notebooks of research and unfinished projects, 1966-2016. VI. Collection of letters to Agamben from correspondents and peers, 1966-2016. VII. Documents on university protests, 1990-2004. VIII. Manuscripts, letters and typescripts by Walter Benjamin, 1910-1939. IX. Writings and other documents about Walter Benjamin, 1928-1996.

bioghist.head: Giorgio Agamben
bioghist.p: Giorgio Agamben (born 1942) is an Italian philosopher.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Giorgio Agamben Papers. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Giorgio Agamben papers contain writings, correspondence, and other papers by or relating to the life and works of Italian philosopher Giorgio Agamben.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Giorgio Agamben Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These files contain five folders and one notebook with preliminary sketches, two manuscripts, one typescript, notes and research materials. This could make possible a new historical-critical edition of the book, Il Linguaggio e la Morte: un Seminario sul Luogo della Negativita, published in 1982.

did.unittitle: Stanze. Le parole e il fantasma nella cultura occidentale

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain three notebooks and two folders, which include an original typescript with hand corrections, preliminary sketches, and notes for the 1977 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain a manuscript, typescripts, notes and sketches for the 1985 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript, typescript, notes and sketches for the 1990 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain a manuscript, two typescripts, notes and sketches for the 1993 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain an original kernel, research materials and sketches within five notebooks and four folders, all from the 1996 book.

did.unittitle: Auschwitz-- l'archivo e il testimone: Homo Sacer 3

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain a manuscript, typescript, notes and sketches for the 1998 book, Homo Sacer 3.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain preliminary sketches, one course to be taught at the Università di Verona, notes and research materials for the 2000 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain a manuscript, notes and sketches for the 2002 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain 6 notebooks, a manuscript, two typescriptes with hand corrections, notes, sketches and research materials for the 2003 Homo Sacer 2.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript-typescript, an incomplete typescript, notes and sketches for the 2007 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder appears in the inventory as "Il regno e la Gloria-- per una genealogia teologica dell' economia e del governo." It contains a notebook and preliminary sketches only for Homo Sacer 2.2, 2007.

did.unittitle: Pulcinella, ovvera divertimento per li ragazzi in quattro scena

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains four typescripts with hand corrections, notes and sketches, and galleys with hand corrections for the 2015 book.

did.unittitle: Stasis, La guerre civile come paradigm politico

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain two notebooks, preliminary sketches, a seminar to be taught at Princeton, notes and research materials for the 2015 book.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains three typescripts with hand corrections and outlines for continuation, as well as manuscript notes and sketches for the 2015 book.

did.unittitle: Manuscripts of published articles and essays

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains manuscripts, sketches, notes and photocopies of "Commedia."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript and typescript from 1981, for the article published in "Aut-Aut" in the following year.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an incomplete manuscript, notes and sketches for the article publiched as a preface to A. Delfini's "Poesia della fine del mondo," 1982.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an original typescript with hand corrections, preliminary sketches and notes for the article published in "Il Centauro," 1985.

did.unittitle: Prefazione a Ingeborg Bachmann: "In Cerca di Frasi Vere"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript, notes and sketches for the essay.

did.unittitle: Experimentum Linguae: Prefazione all'Edizione Francese di "Infanzia e Storia"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains one typescript with hand corrections for the 1989's "Enfance et histoire."

did.unittitle: Recensione A: G. Lardreau: Fictions Philosophique et Science-Fiction

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript with hand corrections for Wahl F. (ed.), Annuaire philosophique 1988-1989.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a French and Italian copy of the article typescript with hand corrections, for the 1990 Revue philosophique.

did.unittitle: Filosofia e Linguistica: Recensione a J.C. Milner, Introduction à Une Science du Langage

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a review of Jean-Claude Milner's work, published in Annuaire philosophique in 1990. The folder contains a manuscript with notes and sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript, notes and sketches for the article published in Marka, 1990.

did.unittitle: Disappropriata Maniera: Introduzione alle Poesie di G. Caproni

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manusprcritp, typescript with hand corrections, Galleys, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript with hand corrections for the essay published in "Trafic," 1992.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript for the new edition of Stanze.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an incomplete manuscript, 2 typescripts, notes, and sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains the manuscript for a preface to L. Trucillo.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript in Italian, two typescripts, one Frencha dn one Italian, as well as notes and sketches for the article in Aut Aut.

did.unittitle: Le Corps à Venir: Sur la Dance

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript in Italian, 2 typescripts in French, notes and sketches.

did.unittitle: Introduzione A: E. Levinas, Riflessoni sulla Filosofia dell' Hitlerismo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript, incomplete typescript, a typescript in French, notes, and an Italian translation of the Levinas text, with Agamben's hand corrections.

did.unittitle: Sull' Impossibilità di Dire "Io": Saggio su F. Jesi

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an incomplete manuscript, a complete manuscript-typescript, a typescript with hand corrections, notes and sketches, and a letter to the director of "Cultura tedesca."

did.unittitle: Introduzione A: G. Manganelli: Contributo Allo Studio delle Dottrine Politiche del Seicento

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a manuscript, two typescripts with hand corrections, notes and sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript with hand corrections, Galleys, notes and sketches.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript with hand corrections.

did.unittitle: Conference à la Commission Européene de la Securité
De la Puissance à la Volanté
La Nozione di Icona e la Metafisica Occidentale
L'Insegnamento della Letteratura e la Trasmissione della Cultura
The Camp as Nomos of Modernity
The Sacred Exception on W. Benjamin
Le Camp comme Nomos de la Modernité
Notes for the Prize to my book "Homo Sacer 1"
Presentation of Antonio Negri's book on Spinoza
Il Problema del Soggetto in Furio Jesi
On W. Benjamin's Thesis on the Concept of History
Batiaille et la Paradoxe de la Soueraineté
Noi rifugiati (Al di là Dei Diritti dell'Uomo)
Oikonomia, le Paradigme Théologique de la Biopolitique
Annotated manuscripts of courses and seminars
Seminar on Paul's Letter to the Romans, Berkeley

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This seminar is alternatively titled, "The Time Which is Left."

did.unittitle: Workshop on the State of Exception, Northwestern
Seminar on Man and Animal, Northwestern
Seminar on Paul and Benjamin, UCLA
Seminar on Benjamin's Thesis on the Concept of History, Northwestern
Seminar on my book, Remnants of Auschwitz, Princeton

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains mostly correspondence with Agamnben inviting him to participate in a seminar about his book, to be taught by others.

did.unittitle: Various documents related to Agamben's courses in American universities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a series of correspondence, files, identifications, and other documents organized by university.

did.unittitle: Seminaire sur Heidegger, College international de philosophie
Seminaire sur Les Passions de lame, College international de philosophie
Seminaire sur Les lettres de Paul, College international de philosophie
Seminaire sur Le temps messianique, Ecole Pratique des Hautes Etudes
Seminaire sur L'usage des corps, College international de philosophie
Seminaire sur L'oevre d'art, Academie de France
Introduction to Heidegger, Università di Macerata
On the Limits of Language, Università di Macerata
Lessons on "Le Passioni dell' Anima," Università di Macerata
Seminar on Hölderlin, Università di Macerata
Seminar on Politics, Università di Macerata
The Passions of the Soul, Università di Verona
Linguaggio e Pensiero, Università di Verona
Che cosa significa: "io posso?", Università di Verona
Ninfe. Le Immagini e il Tempo, Università di Venezia IUAV
Che cos' è la Filosofia?, Università di Venezia IUAV
Il Prima e il Dopo dell' Opera, Università di Venezia IUAV
Sul Corpo Gloriosa, Università di Venezia IUAV
Che cos' è l'Atto di Creazione, Università di Venezia IUAV
Manuscripts and notebooks of research and unfinished projects

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a notebook labeled "On Violence," and subtitled "Quaderno di Appunti (Sulla Violenza), contiene alle ultima pagine il manoscritto del saggio "Sui Limiti Della Violenza" citato da H. Arandt." In the subtitle, Agamben notes that the notebook contains a manuscript of the essay mentioned in the subtitle, "On the Limits of Violence," which first brought his work to the attention of Hannah Arendt.

did.unittitle: Folder on Eden and Paradisum Voluptatis
Folder with manuscripts on Trakl and Leopardi
Folder with typescript and sketches on Vocativo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder features a notebook which is titled "Oath" in the dealer's listing.

did.unittitle: Notebook, Appunti sulla Gloria (Il Regno e la Gloria)
Collection of letters to Agamben from correspondents and peers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 17 letters to Agamben from Negri. The letters are both typed and manuscript, and appear to be in Italian.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 26 manuscript or typed letters to Agamben.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 6 letters and postcards from Guy Debord and one copy of a letter from debord to Mireille Guillet.

did.unittitle: Exchange of letters with Alice Debord

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 5 letters to Agamben.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain 68 letters to Agamben from Fourcade.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains two letters, one manuscript and one typed, to Agamben from Badiou.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 4 letters to Agamben from Levi-Strauss.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 4 letters to Agamben from Lacoue-Labarthe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contians 2 letters to Agamben from Jabès.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 3 letters to Agamben from Milner

did.unittitle: Documents on the Italian student movement, La Pantera

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains documents and newspaper articles related to "La Pantera," a protest movement undertaken by Italian students in 1990 which paralyzed the university system in the country. The protests were against education reforms which would have led to the privatization of education.

did.unittitle: Documents related to Agamben's NYU resignation in protest

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains documents related to Agamben's resignation from NYU. He was responding to the US's imposition of biometric controls on people entering the country.

did.unittitle: Manuscripts, letters and typescripts by Walter Benjamin
Letters and postcards to Herbert Blumenthal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These folders contain 48 letters and postcards written by Benjamin to Blumenthal. Blumenthal later chaned his last name to Belmore.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 22 letters from Benjamin to Carla Seligson, later Blumenthal's spouse.

did.unittitle: Typescript of Walter Benjamin's "Der Rogenbogen. Gespräch über die Phantasie"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains the only known typescript of Benjamin's famous essay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typed letter to Gustav Wyneken, founder of the Jugund Bewegung.

did.unittitle: Partial manuscript of Benjamin's Baudelaire book

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 15 pages of a handwritten manuscript for Benjamin's book, Baudelaire.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 10 pages of handwritten outlines for Benjamin's book, Baudelaire.

did.unittitle: Notes for Essay on the Narrator

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 20 leaves with manuscript and typed notes for Benjamin's essay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 6 leaves with handwritten transcriptions of dreams.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a handwritten index for Berliner Kindheit. On the reverse of the index is a sketch of a crowd of spectators and accompanying text.

did.unittitle: Writings and other documents about Walter Benjamin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an annotated manuscript, notes and sketches for Agamben's writing.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a corrected and annotated manuscript, notes and sketches for the 1982 publication, Lingua e Storia.

did.unittitle: Quatra theses non hermeneutiques sur Walter Benjamin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains an unpublished typescript.

did.unittitle: Catalogo dei manoscritti di Benjamin scoperti alla Bibliothèque Nationale
Exchange of letters with Rolf Tiedermann and others on Italian edition of W. Benjamin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains 10 letters from Tiedermann, 3 from Agamben, and 1 letter each from Magnus Enzensberger, Pierre Missac, and Gary Smith.

did.unittitle: Introduction and curator notes for the Italian edition of W. Benjamin's Buadelairebuch

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This manuscript notebook features observations on Benjamin's writings.

did.unittitle: Photocopies of Benjamin's correspondence with Jean Selz

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a series of photocopies of 1930s letters to Selz from Agamben. It also contains a photocopy of notes on the correspondence.

did.unittitle: Reviews of "Benjamin" by Ernst Bloch, Siegfried Krakauer, G. Scholem and W. Haas

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a number of newspaper clippings with reviews of Benjamin's work. The reviews include Bloch's thoughts on "Einbahnstrasse," 1928; Krakauer's reviews of "Ursprung des Deutschen Traurspiels" and "Einbahnstrasse," 1928; Scholem's review from 1964 and two reviews of Benjamin by Haas, 1961.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains photocopies of the lost original poems, as well as some manuscript notes.

did.unittitle: Copy of P. Valéry Introduction to Encyclopedia Francaise, with Benjamin's notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This folder contains a typescript of Valéry's introduction, as well as some leaves of manuscript notes from Benjamin.
